mapper.insert: INSERT INTO artifact_likes (user_id, artifact_id, liked_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{artifactId}, #{likedAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM artifact_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND artifact_id = #{artifactId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM artifact_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND artifact_id = #{artifactId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artifact_likes WHERE artifact_id = #{artifactId}
SELECT * FROM artifact_likes ORDER BY liked_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
